mxCell.value:
Team Member
✔ Belong to a Team ✔ Work on project ✔ Submit project ✔ Communicate

UserObject.plantUmlData:
{
  "data": "@startuml
skinparam handwritten false
skinparam packageStyle rect
skinparam defaultFontName "Arial"

title SEAL Hackathon Management

' ---- ACTORS ----
actor "Participant" as participant
actor "Team Member" as member
actor "Mentor" as mentor
actor "Judge" as judge
actor "Admin" as admin

' ---- SYSTEM BOUNDARY ----
rectangle "SEAL Hackathon Management" {

    ' ---- 1. User & Team Management ----
    rectangle "1. User & Team Management" #F0F4F8 {
        usecase "Register / Login" as UC_login
        usecase "Verify Email" as UC_verify
        usecase "Manage Profile" as UC_profile
        usecase "Browse Hackathons" as UC_browse
        
        UC_login .> UC_verify : <<include>>
    }

    ' ---- 2. Hackathon Management ----
    rectangle "2. Hackathon Management" #E8F5E9 {
        usecase "View Hackathon Details" as UC_view_hack
        usecase "Register for Hackathon" as UC_reg_hack
        usecase "Accept Rules & Terms" as UC_accept_rules
        usecase "Create Team" as UC_create_team
        usecase "Join Team" as UC_join_team
        usecase "Request to Join Team" as UC_req_join
        usecase "Manage Team" as UC_manage_team
        usecase "Invite / Remove Members" as UC_invite_remove
        usecase "Work on Project" as UC_work_project
        usecase "Submit Project" as UC_submit_project_2
        usecase "Upload Files" as UC_upload_files_2
        
        UC_reg_hack .> UC_accept_rules : <<include>>
        UC_req_join .> UC_create_team : <<extend>>
        UC_req_join .> UC_join_team : <<extend>>
        UC_invite_remove .> UC_manage_team : <<extend>>
        UC_submit_project_2 .> UC_upload_files_2 : <<include>>
    }

    ' ---- 3. Submission Management ----
    rectangle "3. Submission Management" #F3E5F5 {
        usecase "View Submission Requirements" as UC_reqs
        usecase "Submit Project" as UC_submit_p3
        usecase "Upload Files" as UC_upload3
        usecase "Add Project Information" as UC_add_info
        usecase "Update Submission" as UC_update_sub
        usecase "View Submission Status" as UC_view_status
        
        UC_submit_p3 .> UC_upload3 : <<include>>
        UC_submit_p3 .> UC_add_info : <<include>>
    }

    ' ---- 4. Mentorship ----
    rectangle "4. Mentorship" #FFF3E0 {
        usecase "View Mentor Profiles" as UC_view_mentors
        usecase "Request Mentorship" as UC_req_mentor
        usecase "Schedule Session" as UC_schedule
        usecase "Chat with Mentor" as UC_chat
        usecase "Join Session" as UC_join_session
        usecase "Manage Mentorship Requests" as UC_manage_req
        
        UC_req_mentor .> UC_schedule : <<include>>
        UC_chat .> UC_join_session : <<extend>>
    }

    ' ---- 5. Judging & Evaluation ----
    rectangle "5. Judging & Evaluation" #FFEBEE {
        usecase "View Submissions" as UC_judge_view
        usecase "Evaluate Submission" as UC_eval
        usecase "Scoring Criteria" as UC_criteria
        usecase "Provide Feedback" as UC_feedback
        usecase "Submit Scores" as UC_submit_scores
        
        UC_eval .> UC_criteria : <<include>>
    }

    ' ---- 6. Administration ----
    rectangle "6. Administration" #FFFDE7 {
        usecase "Manage Users" as UC_admin_users
        usecase "Manage Hackathons" as UC_admin_hacks
        usecase "Manage Teams" as UC_admin_teams
        usecase "Manage Mentors" as UC_admin_mentors
        usecase "Manage Submissions" as UC_admin_subs
        usecase "Manage Judging" as UC_admin_judging
        usecase "Generate Reports" as UC_admin_reports
    }
}

' ---- CONNECTIONS (ACTORS TO USE CASES) ----

' Participant
participant --> UC_login
participant --> UC_profile
participant --> UC_browse

' Team Member
member --> UC_view_hack
member --> UC_reg_hack
member --> UC_create_team
member --> UC_join_team
member --> UC_manage_team
member --> UC_work_project
member --> UC_submit_project_2

' Link between Submit Project (Group 2) and Submission Management (Group 3)
UC_submit_project_2 --> UC_submit_p3

' Mentor
mentor --> UC_view_mentors
mentor --> UC_req_mentor
mentor --> UC_chat
mentor --> UC_manage_req

' Judge
judge --> UC_judge_view
judge --> UC_eval
judge --> UC_feedback
judge --> UC_submit_scores

' Admin
admin --> UC_admin_users
admin --> UC_admin_hacks
admin --> UC_admin_teams
admin --> UC_admin_mentors
admin --> UC_admin_subs
admin --> UC_admin_judging
admin --> UC_admin_reports

@endum",
  "format": "svg"
}
